articles.title: Christian Bale Weighs in on “Bold Choice” to Make a New ‘American Psycho’: “All the Best to ‘Em” - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: The original Patrick Bateman gave his thoughts on Luca Guadagnino's new adaptation while premiering his latest film 'The Bride!' on Tuesday.
articles.content:
Christian Bale is giving his first thoughts on the new American Psycho movie coming courtesy of Luca Guadagnino.

articles.title: GLP-1s may increase risk of osteoporosis and gout, new research finds - NBC News
articles.description: GLP-1 drugs — including Ozempic and Wegovy — may be tied to a slightly higher risk of osteoporosis and gout, according to research presented Monday at the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons’ annual meeting.Dr.
